original_text: A little residual haze at week one is common.
corrected_text: POD#8 s/p cataract extraction OD; VA plateau attributed to lingering anterior chamber inflammation plus trace residual corneal edema; posterior capsule clear; well-positioned IOL. (Note laterality: right eye is OD.)

original_text: Medium add trials loaded, both eyes.
corrected_text: Base curve 8.6 mm, diameter 14.3 mm, medium add OU.
Successful first soft contact lens fit OU; over-refraction refined OD power.
